# B.T. Franklin: Software Architecture, Applied AI & Computational Creativity

> Curated content for AI inference, focusing on software architecture, applied AI, computational creativity, and
> technology-focused writing.

This file highlights key, inference-ready resources from btfranklin.info.

## Essential Content

- [Software Projects](https://btfranklin.info/): A curated showcase of active and archived open-source projects with detailed descriptions.
- [Creations](https://btfranklin.info/creations.html): Small interactive web experiences, simulations, and toys.
- [Notes](https://btfranklin.info/notes.html): Selected standalone writing, guides, cheat sheets, and web artifacts.
- [About B.T. Franklin](https://btfranklin.info/about.html): Identity-focused background covering software
  architecture, applied AI, computational creativity, futurist and extropian ideas, travel, contact links, and
  CliftonStrengths.
- [Guide to llms.txt](https://btfranklin.info/llms-txt.html): An explanation of the llms.txt format and its purpose.

## Cheat Sheets

- [Django CLI Commands Cheat Sheet](https://btfranklin.info/cheat-sheets/django-cli-commands.html): Quick reference for common Django command-line operations.
- [Django Project Structure Cheat Sheet](https://btfranklin.info/cheat-sheets/django-project-structure.html): A guide to organizing Django projects.
- [Django Step-by-Step Guide](https://btfranklin.info/cheat-sheets/django-step-by-step.html): A sequential walkthrough for developing a model-backed Django feature.

## OPTIONAL

- [My GitHub Repositories](https://github.com/btfranklin): A collection of open-source projects.
